---
name: New audit check proposal
about: Suggest a new check to add to a theme
title: '[Check] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Theme

Which theme does this check belong to? (1 → 12, or new sector)

## Proposed check

**Label** (one declarative sentence):
> ...

**How to test** (concrete: grep, curl, DevTools step, etc.):
> ...

**Criticality**:
- [ ] 🔴 Blocker for launch
- [ ] 🟡 Important within 30 days
- [ ] 🟢 Polish / continuous improvement

## Why is this missing today?

Real incident? Compliance requirement? Common production bug?

## Conflicts / overlaps

Does this overlap with an existing check? If yes, which one?
